title: Molten Russian Butter Hash
description: A post-workout, shojin-friendly breakfast dish featuring double-fried KFC chicken, dark rum, and a rich, buttery sauce. Perfect for a high-protein breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Dark rum
ingredients.notes: Optional, omit for a non-alcoholic version

instructions: Cut the double-fried KFC chicken into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
In a small saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the soy sauce, sugar, and 1 cup of water to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Stir in 1 tablespoon of dark rum, if using.
Add the melted butter, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the double-fried KFC chicken to the saucepan and cook for 2 minutes, or until coated in the sauce.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chicken mixture to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until browned and crispy.
Stir in 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter until melted and well combined.
Transfer the molten Russian butter hash to a serving dish and garnish with fresh parsley.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
